ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly identifies the character as Hercule (the Funimation localization of Mr. Satan). Visual match is unambiguous: voluminous curly dark hair, thick mustache, red martial arts jacket, stocky broad-shouldered build, showboating pose — all canonical visual identifiers of Mr. Satan/Hercule as depicted throughout Dragon Ball Z and Dragon Ball Super. This is not an unnamed figure; the card title is the character name.

trivia_bullets.text: World Martial Arts Tournament (TB2) launched September 21, 2018 as the second themed booster for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game. Unlike series boosters, TB2 is built around a single narrative location — the World Tournament — and is designed so players can construct complete competitive decks from a single box. Each color in the set focuses on a different tournament era from Dragon Ball history. [Official DBS Card Game: WMAT Design Concept]
sources: dbs-cardgame.com: World Martial Arts Tournament Design Concept
Cardmarket: World Martial Arts Tournament TB2

trivia_bullets.text: Hercule (real name Mark, a pun on Japanese 'akuma' / devil) is the reigning World Martial Arts Champion — a title he won legitimately by beating normal humans during the years Goku and company were off-planet or otherwise occupied. He publicly claimed credit for Cell's defeat, a lie that made him Earth's most celebrated hero. He is Videl's father and, later, Buu's unlikely best friend. [Wikipedia: Mr. Satan / Dragon Ball Wiki: Mr. Satan]

TB2-001 is numbered first in the World Martial Arts Tournament set, giving Hercule the literal card-number slot of a 'leader' card or first pick of his color. At $0.15 market price, this Uncommon is modest in monetary value but its slot-001 position signals Hercule's prominence within the TB2 narrative frame — he is, after all, the tournament's canonical face for normal humans. [TCGplayer: World Martial Arts Tournament]
sources: TCGplayer: Dragon Ball Super CCG World Martial Arts Tournament

related_cards.name: Heroic Duo Videl
related_cards.note: Videl is Hercule's daughter; the 'Heroic Duo' in her card name is a direct pairing with Gohan

related_cards.name: Mighty Mask, Powers Combined
related_cards.note: Trunks and Goten entered Hercule's tournament in disguise as Mighty Mask
